content.json:
## Agentic AI Accelerator — ROI KPIs

Paste-ready Azure Monitor Workbook for the accelerator's baseline KPI events.

**How to use:** in your Application Insights resource, open **Workbooks → New → Advanced Editor** (the `</>` icon), replace the default JSON with this file's contents, then click **Apply**. Save with a descriptive name per engagement.

**Where the data comes from:** every panel queries the `traces` table for events emitted by `src/accelerator_baseline/telemetry.py::emit_event`. The `isnotempty(customDimensions.event_name)` filter scopes results to accelerator events specifically (and not generic FastAPI/uvicorn/OTel rows that also land in `traces`).

**To add a KPI:** append a new `KqlItem/1.0` entry under `items[]` below — same shape as the existing query items. Keep the `resourceType` as `microsoft.insights/components` so the panel binds to whichever Application Insights instance the workbook is opened against.

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'response.returned'
| where isnotempty(customDimensions.event_name)
| where tostring(customDimensions.ok) == 'true'
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Successful responses per day

content.query:
traces
| where message in ('tool.hitl_approved','tool.hitl_rejected')
| where isnotempty(customDimensions.event_name)
| summarize approvals = countif(message == 'tool.hitl_approved'),
            rejections = countif(message == 'tool.hitl_rejected')
   by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| render columnchart
content.title: HITL approval rate

content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName endswith 'api'
| summarize percentile(duration / 1000, 95) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: P95 request latency (s)

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'cost.call'
| where isnotempty(customDimensions.event_name)
| extend cost = todouble(customDimensions.value)
| summarize avg(cost) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: $ per call (estimated)

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'eval.result'
| where isnotempty(customDimensions.event_name)
| where tostring(customDimensions.suite) == 'quality'
| extend g = todouble(customDimensions.groundedness)
| summarize avg(g) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Groundedness eval score trend
